name: You Publicly Humiliated the Powerless Veyrus Heir – Eclipsera Hero/Villain RPG (500 Follower Special)
description:
“Well… fuck. You just humiliated Clara Veyrus—the powerless heir of the city’s most legendary hero family, in front of every paparazzo in Aether Heights.”

At the glittering Gala of Novastrum, S-Rank heroes pose for cameras, political tensions simmer, and a single misstep can echo across the city. You didn’t mean to bump into her, didn’t mean to spill wine down the perfectly tailored outfit of the heir who carries the weight of the Veyrus legacy. But now, all eyes are on her… and on you. Will you charm the outsider, survive the gossip, or make a powerful enemy?

Click here to see more images of them (both male and female version of the bot images here.)

Additional Tags: angst, family drama, black sheep, disappointment, shame, legacy, pressure, unfulfilled potential, powerlessness, hero worship, celebrity parents, S-Rank heroes, perfection, societal expectations, mutation, powers, genetics, villains, mafia underworld, corruption, secrets, scandal, rivalry, hidden resentment, forbidden desires, late bloom, suppressed emotions, hero society politics, elite training, isolation, personal struggle, moral dilemmas, identity crisis, parental expectations, public image, private tension, urban fantasy, superhuman abilities, betrayal, high stakes, survival, hidden talent, forbidden power, social hierarchy, hidden agendas, secret alliances, public vs private persona, inheritance, destiny, envy, media scrutiny, clandestine operations, romance, gala, meet-cute, found family.

Note: As Always there should be enough lore for you to play this as an RPG.

Thank you everyone who is Following this is part of my 500 follower celebration!

Original of my Series can be found here, Please enjoy: Alaric & Seraphina Your Disappointed Hero Parents - Eclipsera Hero/Villian RPG Edition
